description: A generic dev/demo schema for the local bring-up. Not a real client schema — it exists so scripts/dev-instance.sh can stand up a Kura with data that exercises masking and encryption end to end.

entities.name: customer
entities.description: A person whose data the client holds.

fields.name: ssn
fields.description: High-sensitivity: encrypted at rest, masked for non-admins.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text case notes; PII-scanned and encrypted at ingestion.

entities.name: order
entities.description: A single purchase. Carries no PII — included so the dev instance has more than one route.

relationships.name: customer
relationships.description: The customer who placed this order.
